selection_basis: K=3,N=35 is the smallest N at K=3 for which both conditions meet the preregistered target/variance rule; K=3,N=20 fails for d0. K=4,N=50 also qualifies exactly at the lower target boundary and is retained as a stress setting rather than the sole primary point.
claim_boundary: Calibration choice only; no test-set or WAD superiority claim.
